channel.title: AI Lab Daily
channel.description: Daily practical guides on Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor and the cutting-edge AI tools used by indie devs and freelancers.

item.title: Claude Tells Users to Sleep Mid-Session: 5 Takeaways
item.description: Claude is telling users to go to sleep mid-session. Why it's happening, what it signals, and 5 fixes devs can apply now.

item.title: Claude at Dunder Mifflin: 5 Roleplay Prompts That Test AI Personality
item.description: A viral Reddit thread put Claude through a Dunder Mifflin first day. Here are 5 roleplay prompts to test AI tone, humor and persona stability.

item.title: Left or Right? The ChatGPT Image A/B Test That Picks Winners
item.description: How the 'left or right' ChatGPT image trend on Reddit doubles as a free A/B testing workflow for creators and indie hackers.

item.title: Sea Limited Deploys OpenAI Codex: 5 Dev Takeaways
item.description: Sea Limited's CPO David Chen details how OpenAI Codex is rolling out across Asia engineering teams for agentic software development.

item.title: ChatGPT Copyrighted Characters: 5 Risks to Avoid
item.description: A viral r/ChatGPT post on generating copyrighted characters exposes IP risks indie creators face in 2026.

item.title: Figure AI 03 Robot Runs 30 Hours Nonstop: 5 Takeaways
item.description: Figure AI 03 humanoid ran for over 30 hours straight on livestream. What the endurance demo means for jobs and builders.

item.title: Real Monet Mistaken for AI Art: 5 Detection Lessons
item.description: A genuine Monet painting was posted as 'AI-generated' on X and fooled thousands. Here is what AI art detection in 2026 still gets wrong.

item.title: 7 ChatGPT Daily Workflow Habits Power Users Run in 2026
item.description: A Reddit thread on r/ChatGPT reveals how heavy users structure their day around the chatbot. Here are the patterns and how to copy them.

item.title: 5 Viral ChatGPT Prompts From a Tweet That Rewired Workflows
item.description: A viral r/ChatGPT thread surfaced the prompts users say changed their workflow. Here are the 5 most-cited patterns and how to apply them.

item.title: AI Weekly Roundup (2026-05-14)
item.description: The week's top AI news on Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor and emerging tools, curated.

item.title: 5 ChatGPT Prompts That Fix Game of Thrones Plot Holes
item.description: Five ChatGPT prompts that turn plot holes into structural fixes - tested on Game of Thrones, usable on any story.

item.title: Why ChatGPT Feels Scary Accurate: 5 Patterns to Know
item.description: ChatGPT often feels uncannily accurate in personality reads. Here is why the responses land, and how to use the effect in work.

item.title: ChatGPT Retirement Prompt: Why It Went Viral on Reddit
item.description: A Reddit user asked ChatGPT to imagine its own retirement. The reply sparked debate on AI self-reflection prompts. Here's what to try.
